assignments.twist: log-asset is a regime-switching jump-diffusion with random (uncertain) coefficients, i.e. an exponential-Levy generalization of GBM analyzed via characteristic functions

core_model_summary: A stochastic asset-price model whose log-price is an additive drift-plus-Brownian-plus-compound-Poisson (jump-diffusion) process with random parameters and regime switching, giving an exponential (GBM-type) price with tractable characteristic functions.
